reference: Hi, I am a diabetic, and I have a corn on my small toe. I am from England and used to go to the chiropodist once a month to have this removed. I last had it done one year ago, so you can imagine how painful this is. Is there any help I can get for this corn, please? I would also like to mention that I am seventy-eight years old.
